content.en:
"When Yue'er was at the emperor level, although she didn't become the son of the universe, not even the nine-star peerless Tianjiao, but after Yue'er became a god-level, I used the deprivation of the ability to copy talent again and again to give Yue'er many powerful talents, plus the many secret techniques and resources I gave down, Yue'er's combat power is definitely not weaker than that of ordinary children of the universe!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Son of the Universe is not necessarily stronger than Tianjiao, in the realms from the emperor level to the great god level, the Son of the Universe is blessed by the universe and can break the limit of combat power, and those strong people who break through from Tianjiao are indeed difficult to beat the Son of the Universe.

But once it becomes a galaxy level, the title of the child of the universe is gone, and the Tianjiao level has the hope of defeating the child of the universe.

In Ye Tian's eyes, Yue'er has the strength to defeat the Son of the Universe.

In the ring.

Xiao Yue and the Cold Light Sword Monarch each stood aside, only to see the Cold Light Sword Monarch take out an Origin Artifact Long Sword that emitted cold light, and a terrifying aura erupted, shocking the audience.

"The Cold Light Sword Monarch is so strong!"

Someone exclaimed.

At this time, Xiao Yue also took out her weapon.

Rumble!!!!

A set of origin artifact battle armor appeared on Xiao Yue's body, and an origin artifact long sword also appeared in his hand, a pair of origin artifact combat boots appeared under his feet, and an origin artifact battle helmet also appeared on his head, and a green lotus appeared above his head.

"So many Origin Artifacts !!"

The Cold Light Sword Monarch was also stunned.

You must know that even at his level, it is very difficult to obtain an Origin Artifact, if it is not for his unparalleled combat power, otherwise he would not want to get an Origin Artifact Long Sword at all.

But now, Xiao Yue has so many origin artifacts, and the grade is much higher than his origin artifact.

"All of them are top-grade origin artifacts, and my origin artifacts are just ordinary goods!"

The Cold Light Sword Monarch was jealous, but he didn't show the slightest hint of concern.

After all, although the Origin Artifact can increase its combat power, it will not be too outrageous, and it really relies on its own combat power.

At this time, everyone in the audience was very shocked by Xiao Yue's whole body equipment, and they were amazed that Tiange was rich.

Even those cosmic gods were a little envious, although they also had a few origin artifacts, their grade was not as good as Xiao Yue's.

However, they also knew very well that Xiao Yue and Tiange would not be able to get such an origin artifact, and it must have been given by Ye Tian.

"Yue'er, don't keep your hands, let's do it as you like!"

Ye Tian said.

"Husband, Yue'er understands!"

Xiao Yue nodded.

Soon, the battle began.

At the first time, Xiao Yue opened the time talent and the space talent, and both talents reached the arcane level.

The time talent and space talent of the mystery-level are enough for Xiao Yue to use, and Ye Tian also has the ability to raise Xiao Yue's time talent and space talent to the god level, but there is no need, it is too dazzling and not a good thing.

If Ye Tian was now at the supreme level, he would be able to do so much, but now he is only at the galaxy level, so he can't be so high-profile.

Xiao Yue not only has an arcane-level time talent and an arcane-level space talent, but also has cultivated a time supernatural ability and a spatial supernatural ability, both of which are very powerful!

"Time Magic - Thinking Freeze!"

"Spatial Divine Power - Three Realms Prison!"

Bang!!!!

In an instant, the Cold Light Sword Monarch's mind was frozen by Xiao Yue's time supernatural ability, although he could still sense the situation in the outside world and have a way to sense Xiao Yue's actions, but the speed of thinking could not keep up.

In addition, the spatial divine power of the Three Realms Prison suppressed the body of the Cold Light Sword Monarch, making it difficult for him to move.

The next moment.

Xiao Yue held the best origin artifact long sword and slashed out a sword, although the power of this sword did not reach the sword dao mastery, but it was also a top-level sword skill, plus the increase of the origin artifact, it was enough to be comparable to the weaker sword dao mastery.

This sword slashed out, and the Cold Light Sword Monarch showed a look of despair.

He knew that he couldn't stop it, and he would be killed directly, but his mind was frozen, and his body was suppressed by the spatial supernatural power, so he couldn't hide at all, and he couldn't resist.

"Save ......"

The Cold Light Sword Monarch asked the Baili Sword Lord for help and shouted out a word.

As a cosmic god, the Baili Sword Lord naturally knew very well that the Cold Light Sword Monarch could not block this sword, so he made a move and instantly brought the Cold Light Sword Monarch out of the ring.

Boom!!!

Xiao Yue's sword slashed through the air, but she smiled, because she had won.

"Baili Sword Master, what do you mean by this?"

Ye Tian asked.

"This time, we admit defeat!"

The Hundred Miles Sword Lord replaced the Cold Light Sword Monarch.

"Since the Ten Lights Sword Sect has admitted defeat this time, Yue'er, you should come back!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Hmm!"

Xiao Yue returned to Ye Tian's side.

At this time, no one in the audience looked down on Xiao Yue anymore, and it was obvious that even if Xiao Yue didn't have those origin artifacts, his combat power was stronger than the cold light sword light.

"I didn't expect that the wife of Allah also has the talent of time and space, which is really surprising!"

"It's nothing to have time talent and space talent, the key is the time talent and space talent of the mystical level, this is very rare, this level of time talent and space talent can cultivate time and space power, and the power is extremely terrifying!"

"All along, I thought that there were no geniuses in the Heavenly Pavilion except for Allah of Ten Thousand Laws, it seems that we underestimated the Heavenly Pavilion!"

......

The galaxy-level competition is over, and then it's the turn of the galaxy level.

The Ten Light Sword Sect also knew very well that they had no chance of winning in this galaxy-level competition, so they casually sent a top-notch galaxy-level deacon to appear.

On the Tiange side, Ye Tian naturally appeared in person.

"Ten Light Sword Sect, Yuanguang Allah!"

"Heavenly Pavilion, Allah of Ten Thousand Laws!"

After the two guaranteed each other's names, they began to fight.

Ye Tian didn't bother to delay time at all, and with a wave of his hand, he directly suppressed Yuan Guang with his momentum Allah it was difficult to move, and he couldn't even control his body and withdrew from the ring step by step.

In this battle, Ye Tian won easily.

For such a result, others were not surprised, after all, Ye Tian was too demonic, if he couldn't even clean up a galaxy level, it would be too abnormal.

In the three battles, Tiange won two victories, and his points were temporarily one point higher than that of the Ten Light Sword Sect.

But the real decisive battle is still between Ye Tian and the Baili Sword Master, who can win can be regarded as a real victory.

"Allah, do you want to prepare? If not, let's enter the competition now!"

The Baili Sword Lord asked confidently.

"No preparation, let's get started!"

Ye Tian teleported to the ring, and the Baili Sword Lord also flew to the ring.

From the point of view of cultivation, Ye Tian is not even the peak of the galaxy level now, it was not long before he broke through the galaxy level before he stabilized the realm, and now his cultivation is the third order of the galaxy level.

Although it was not difficult for him to impact from the first order of the galaxy level to the ninth order, it would only take some time, but the cultivation of the third order of the galaxy level was indeed very disadvantageous against the hundred-mile sword master.

Because the Baili Sword Lord is the cultivation of the peak of the cosmic gods, and his combat power is also very strong, he was also an ordinary son of the universe in the past, although he is the weakest kind, but he still crushes countless cosmic gods, and ranks among the top ten cosmic gods in Tianlan Giant City.

In the eyes of many people, although Ye Tian could fight beyond the ranks, he could only deal with some powerful cosmic gods at most, and he was not comparable to a cosmic god like the Baili Sword Lord at all.

But they will never know Ye Tian's combat power, Ye Tian can kill the Baili Sword Master with one move, but it is impossible for him to reveal his true combat power this time.

"It's okay to show a small part of my strength, so that the outside world can misestimate my combat power, and it can also avoid some unnecessary trouble!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the blink of an eye, the duel began!
